purpose: Ensure every HTML, rendered Markdown, Plotly graph and user-facing view declares its backing data, references, evidence level and repo links.
parity_rule: No visual or rendered claim should appear without an evidence pointer, SSoT source, proof level or explicit unsupported/speculative flag.
dominant_gap: Visual maturity exceeds operational evidence maturity in telemetry and real-gas validated layers.

launch_policy.html_rule: Every HTML page must expose source links and evidence level.
launch_policy.plotly_rule: Every Plotly graph must expose backing JSON/YAML/CSV sources.
launch_policy.markdown_rule: Every rendered Markdown report must expose references and supporting artifacts.
launch_policy.unsupported_rule: Unsupported visuals must be marked speculative or E0.
